'''Haum Do''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] journalist with a bubbly personality.

==Biography==
An orphan on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], Do grew up in the information-rich [[Datum District]] and became a reporter. She was quite curious for a Kaminoan and had the uncanny knack of appearing wherever and whenever important stories broke, whether she was invited or not.

She began working as [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] correspondent for [[TriNebulon News/Legends|TriNebulon News]], usually based on [[Foamwander City]]. Natives dealing with her were unsure about what species she was. Haum Do was among the people investigating the [[planetary repulsor]] chamber found on the greatest of the [[Mkbuto Islands]], an event attracting great attention from the media, which was later revealed to be a fake.
